# ddff_feature_flag (Data Source)

Looks up a Datadog feature flag by its stable key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ddff_feature_flag" "new_checkout" {
  key = "new_checkout_flow"
}

output "new_checkout_id" {
  value = data.ddff_feature_flag.new_checkout.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Stable, code-facing key of the feature flag to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String) Description shown in the Datadog UI.
- `id` (String) UUID of the feature flag.
- `json_schema` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `value_type` (String)
- `variants` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variants))

<a id="nestedatt--variants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variants`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `value` (String)
